deal_killers.objection: No reliable PMS/booking-engine integration for direct booking attribution.
Failure to demonstrate attributable ROI on direct bookings/revenue within the pilot window or inability to satisfy Swiss‑hosted GDPR/data‑governance requirements.
No reliable integration to track enquiries and attribute direct bookings (cannot prove revenue uplift).
No credible, local proof that hotels of similar size see net direct revenue uplift within 3–6 months.

blockers.blocker: Unproven direct-booking attribution and PMS/booking-engine integration access/timelines.
Owner pushback on recurring spend and contract length without local proof and KPI guarantees.
Owner/finance skepticism about ROI attribution and added operational burden, compounded by PMS/CRS integration lead times and potential agency resistance.
Inability to produce clean, auditable attribution from contact enquiries to confirmed bookings; the owner will not approve recurring spend without this.
Owner/Finance insist on audited, local proof of net direct revenue uplift and are averse to a CHF 3k–5k recurring commitment.
